title: Les gosses mènent l'enquête
writer: Francis Didelot, Maurice Labro, Yvan Noé
actors: Constant Rémy, Lise Topart, René Génin
plot: When Monsieur Crauqual, the supervisor, is found hanging, all wonder why this rather rich person decided to kill himself. And when a pupil is found hanging too, François and his friends decide to investigate. They are certain ther...
